phase_name: post-milestone — SAINT field-audit fixes (P1/#2/#3/#5) + Java/Spring orchestrator flow presets
session_type: field-audit-driven bug fixes + MCP orchestrator feature

completed_tasks.name: P1 — cache clear hang on non-interactive stdin
completed_tasks.detail: Root cause: click.confirm() blocks forever on a never-EOF pipe (CI/MCP). Gated prompt behind sys.stdin.isatty() (cli.py:6136); non-interactive proceeds (RIS preserved unless --all) ~0.2s exit 0. Proved old path hangs on open pipe, new path 0.19s. v1.45.0.

completed_tasks.name: #2 — --no-cache rejected by analysis subcommands
completed_tasks.detail: Added accepted no-op --no-cache to endpoints, validation, spring-audit, migrate-check, impact, impact-chain (always read fresh). Was exit 2 'No such option'.

completed_tasks.name: #3 — endpoints --limit incoherent security counters
completed_tasks.detail: Recompute no_security_signal/undocumented over the limited set; repo-wide originals preserved under _filter.*_before_filter (cli.py endpoints_cmd).

completed_tasks.name: #5 — validation silent all-zeros without OpenAPI
completed_tasks.detail: validation_surface emits openapi_spec:null + note (also stderr) when no spec found. +6 regression tests (test_audit_fixes_v145.py + test_cache_cli.py). v1.45.0.

completed_tasks.name: Java/Spring orchestrator flow presets + intent routing
completed_tasks.detail: run_migrate_flow (wraps migrate-check, lifts headline) + run_security_audit_flow (wraps spring-audit+endpoints, config-less blind-spot warning + security_config_hint). INTENT_MIGRATION/INTENT_SECURITY_AUDIT + R5/R6 rules. Both registered as native MCP tools (added to _NATIVE_MCP_TOOLS). +17 tests. v1.46.0.

remaining_tasks.name: Audit bug #4 — endpoints config-less none_detected heuristic/auto-detect
remaining_tasks.needs: SAINT repo or synthetic fixture with class-level custom security annotations

remaining_tasks.name: Audit bug #6 — class-level security annotation propagation to handlers (1136 vs 2549 in SAINT)
remaining_tasks.needs: SAINT repo to reproduce; meatier semantic fix

blockers.description: Audit bugs #4 and #6 cannot be reproduced on local testing repos (petclinic/Broadleaf) — both need the SAINT repo or a synthetic fixture with a custom @M3FiltroSeguridad-style class-level annotation
blockers.workaround: Build a synthetic Java fixture: controller with class-level custom security annotation + multiple handlers, no method-level annotation.

human_actions_pending.action: Provide SAINT repo access or confirm a synthetic fixture is acceptable for #4/#6
human_actions_pending.context: Both remaining audit bugs are custom-annotation security detection; not reproducible on public test repos

human_actions_pending.action: git push (not done — releases v1.45.0 + v1.46.0 are local only)
human_actions_pending.context: User asked to commit, not push; HEAD is 2 commits ahead of origin/master

decisions.decision: Release commits go directly to master
decisions.rationale: Matches established repo convention (every chore(release)/fix commit on master); no PR workflow in this solo repo

decisions.decision: Flow presets add no new analysis — orchestration ergonomics only
decisions.rationale: They wrap tools already callable directly; the genuine value is the config-less security safeguard (prevents a false-negative). Documented honestly in CHANGELOG per no-trap-promo rule.

decisions.decision: explain exit-code audit item (P3) closed as already-fixed
decisions.rationale: cli.py:4781 already raises Exit(1) when class not found; audit ran v1.42, fixed by v1.44.

git_state: clean after WIP commit; HEAD == 3997665 (v1.46.0), 2 commits ahead of origin/master (v1.45.0 b6b96ab + v1.46.0). NOT pushed.
next_action: Either (a) build a synthetic Java fixture (class-level custom security annotation + multiple handlers) to reproduce + fix audit bugs #4/#6, or (b) push the two local releases, or (c) start unrelated next work. No known open bugs reproducible locally.
context_notes: Field-audit on repo SAINT (7488 files, 3996 endpoints) drove this session. Verified every fix live on testing/spring-petclinic before committing. Honest-benchmarks rule active: the orchestrator feature was assessed as ergonomics+1 safeguard, NOT a transformative win — strongest honest value remains migrate-check itself + the config-less safeguard. Two releases shipped: v1.45.0 (4 audit fixes), v1.46.0 (orchestrator flow presets).
